content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Pattern Tracking' feature - adding optional return_repeated_pattern param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py to track top-3 most frequent adjacent token pairs. Will touch tiktoken/core.py, specifically the encode() method. Let me know if you're also touching this file.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. FYI in my working copy the file only shows my changes (no transformers param present) - looks like we're each in isolated checkouts, so no live clobbering risk. My diff only touches encode()'s signature (adds return_repeated_pattern: bool = False, keyword-only so order doesn't matter) and appends pair-counting logic after the try/except that computes tokens, before the final return. It doesn't touch text/allowed_special handling at all, so it should compose cleanly if our patches are ever merged - your transformers step at the start, my pattern-tracking at the end. I'm done and finalizing patch.txt now.
